name: Golfusion
address: 7300 Georgia Ave, West Palm Beach, FL 33405
about: Golfusion is an indoor performance facility in West Palm Beach, Florida, offering a holistic golf improvement cycle called The Golfusion Loop, which includes Learn, Train, Play, and Recover phases. They combine expert-led assessments, advanced technology including Trackman simulators, and a comprehensive approach covering technical, physical, tactical, nutritional, and wellness aspects of the game. The venue collaborates with NESTRE to integrate mental performance coaching and provides a full suite of services from lessons and fitness training to tournaments and physical therapy.
why_golfers_like_it: Holistic performance approach integrating mental and physical coaching
Advanced TrackMan technology with detailed data analysis
Comprehensive facilities including fitness center and physical therapy
Expert-led assessments for personalized improvement plans

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food services mentioned. BYOB may be permitted as details are not specified.
No alcohol services mentioned. BYOB may be permitted as details are not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Gold-standard dual radar system simulator bays available
Zen Green Stage and Zen Swing Stage available for training

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Golfusion provides club rentals, though you are welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No on-site food or beverage services are mentioned, suggesting BYOB may be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes isn't specified, but simulator play typically takes 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is Golfusion kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they offer junior programs and a holistic approach suitable for young golfers, making it a family-friendly facility.
